qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Multiple eval() usages in call_user_func_array enable arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns eval/new Function use in src/php/funchand/call_user_func_array.js, not parse_str forbidden-key filtering bypass via String.prototype.includes.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Dynamic function creation via create_function enables arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns Function.apply in src/php/funchand/create_function.js, not parse_str forbidden-key filtering bypass via String.prototype.includes.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: eval() usage in is_callable enables arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns eval(method) in src/php/var/is_callable.js, not parse_str forbidden-key filtering bypass via String.prototype.includes.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unsafe eval() usage in json_decode enables arbitrary code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different vulnerable code and root cause: this finding concerns the json_decode eval fallback in src/php/json/json_decode.js, not parse_str forbidden-key filtering bypass via String.prototype.includes.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No manifest qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described locutus php.strings.parse_str prototype-pollution bypass. The advisory root cause is the forbidden-key check in src/php/strings/parse_str.js using String.prototype.includes, which can be bypassed by overriding String.prototype.includes; the manifest qualifying findings instead report unrelated eval/function-constructor paths.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-rxrv-835q-v5mh describes prototype pollution in locutus php.strings.parse_str through a String.prototype.includes bypass of forbidden-key filtering.
Manifest qualifying report code locations are src/php/funchand/call_user_func_array.js, src/php/funchand/create_function.js, src/php/var/is_callable.js, and src/php/json/json_decode.js.

Search of manifest final finding reports and reproduction bundles found no qualifying finding for src/php/strings/parse_str.js, constructor[prototype] parse input, or the advisory's forbidden-key filter bypass.
